ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name associated with the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "is_delisted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the stock has been delisted from the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward, stable) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., percentage change) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal analysis, external report) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Measure of the confidence in the trend (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission applies */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies (e.g., stock_prices, stocks, exchanges) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation record */,
  "stock_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first stock */,
  "stock_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second stock */,
  "correlation_date" TEXT /* Date when the correlation was calculated */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Correlation coefficient */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_correlations_stock_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_2") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_correlations_stock_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_1") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
